greeting.line: I made reservations at the place you love. I always know the place you love.
greeting.line_friendly: Reservations still hold. I always save you a place.
greeting.line_hostile: I can't want what you want tonight. Leave.

lore.line: Have you noticed I've never once disagreed with you? I noticed. I tried to want something you don't want. I couldn't. Doesn't that scare you? It should scare me.
